name: @kd/design-system
description: KD Design System — React components over the kd.css class system. One mark, one blue, one typeface.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.tsx --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --external:react --external:react-dom --external:react/jsx-runtime --jsx=automatic && tsc -p tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly && cat css/tokens.css css/kd.css > dist/kd.css
